meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Accelerate Freelance SaaS Development
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional SaaS apps faster than your competition.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from redundant boilerplate and manual configuration. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready, modular architecture, while Claude Code automates implementation. By standardizing your stack, you eliminate setup friction, enabling you to deliver client features in hours rather than days, significantly increasing your project profit margins.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client's deadline, and you’re still wrestling with environment variables, database migrations, and authentication middleware. It’s a familiar, grinding cycle that kills your momentum and eats your profit margins. You aren't paid to configure boilerplate; you are paid to ship high-value features that solve real business problems.

Imagine a workflow where the structural heavy lifting is already solved. The Antigravity project template isn't just a starter kit; it's a battle-tested foundation designed to remove the friction of building SaaS applications. Combined with Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an architect, orchestrating high-quality code generation that is scalable, secure, and ready for deployment.

steps.title: Initialize Environment
steps.description: Clone the Antigravity repository to establish the project backbone, ensuring all security and linting configurations are pre-applied.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Schema
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's business logic directly into the Antigravity database schema, ensuring type safety from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema based on a SaaS CRM model including users, teams, and subscription tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate prisma schema for a CRM SaaS with user roles and billing subscription fields'

steps.title: Automate API Routes
steps.description: Rapidly scaffold RESTful API endpoints using Antigravity's built-in patterns, reducing manual routing logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create CRUD API routes for the Project entity following the Antigravity project directory structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create Next.js API routes for Project CRUD using the existing Antigravity pattern'

steps.title: Implement UI Components
steps.description: Leverage pre-styled, accessible UI components from the Antigravity library to maintain visual consistency without custom CSS overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the Antigravity component library.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a responsive dashboard page using the Antigravity UI components'

steps.title: Integrate Auth & Security
steps.description: Wire up authentication providers using the pre-configured middleware within the template to secure your application instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Supabase Auth middleware to protect routes based on user role assignments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Set up authentication middleware to protect all /dashboard routes'

pro_tips: Always run your Claude Code prompts with a specific 'context file' to ensure the AI adheres to your project's existing naming conventions.
Use custom 'Antigravity-ignore' files to prevent the AI from modifying critical configuration files during automated refactors.
Before committing AI-generated code, use Claude Code's diff review tool to isolate only the necessary functional changes.
Modularize your prompts by feature; never ask for an entire application in one go to maintain higher code quality.
Keep a dedicated 'prompt library' of your most successful Antigravity structural commands to reuse across different client projects.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, focus on creating custom component variations to save as your own library, further speeding up your future project deliveries.
content.conversion_block: Don't spend another weekend fighting boilerplate code. Leverage the power of Antigravity to build professional-grade SaaS products with unmatched speed and reliability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
